name: yukineko
description: yukineko's subscription-native Claude Code harness — condukt orchestration, fugu-router model routing, spec/verify gates, and HOTL tooling. No API key; bundled per-platform binaries.

plugins.name: beacon
plugins.description: Desktop & webhook notifications for Claude Code: Stop and Notification hooks that ping you (macOS/Linux desktop, Slack, generic webhook, or a custom command) when a turn finishes or Claude needs your input — so you can step away from long sessions. Subscription-native (two hooks + bundled Rust binary, no API key).

plugins.name: blastguard
plugins.description: Destructive-operation guard for Claude Code: a PreToolUse hook that denies project-wrecking Bash commands and file operations (recursive/wildcard rm, git reset --hard, git clean -fd, single-> truncating overwrites, truncate/shred/mkfs/dd of=, recursive chmod/chown, find -delete) before they run, while exempting repo config files (.claude/**, *.toml, *.yaml/yml, *.lock, package.json, .config/**). Subscription-native (one PreToolUse hook + bundled Rust binary, no API key).

plugins.name: backlog
plugins.description: Cross-project task queue with cycle-type tags for Claude Code: a /backlog skill that loops through open items (lock → pick → /condukt → done), a SessionStart hook that surfaces pending work at session open, and a backlog binary with list/next/done/fail/lock subcommands. Subscription-native (skill + hook + bundled Rust binary, no API key).

plugins.name: budgetguard
plugins.description: Real-time cost budget gate for Claude Code: on Stop, read the session transcript, compute USD cost, and block the turn when session or daily limits are exceeded — feeding the overage back so the agent winds down gracefully. Subscription-native (one Stop hook + bundled Rust binary, no API key).

plugins.name: compass
plugins.description: Goal re-grounding + next-move derivation upstream of condukt for Claude Code: when the goal goes fuzzy or you stall after finishing a chunk, it carves the project charter (north star + definition of done + current gap) through an interrogate loop, then routes only the right-sized next move into condukt while parking side-quests to taskprog. Subscription-native (SessionStart nudge + Stop breadcrumb hooks + /compass skill + bundled Rust binary, no API key).

plugins.name: condukt
plugins.description: Deterministic orchestration engine for Claude Code: an interpreter/worker/verifier skill plus a Rust binary that schedules tasks into parallel/serial batches by file-conflict analysis, manages the git-worktree lifecycle, tracks run state, and gates completion. Subscription-native (skill + agents + hook, no API key).

plugins.name: ctxrot
plugins.description: Context-rot guard for Claude Code: detect, rescue, restore, distill, and CONTROL what loads into context (rule-based allow/deny gate + /ctx pin/drop/load + switchable carryover). Subscription-native (hooks + subagent + skill, no API key).

plugins.name: deepwiki
plugins.description: Repository architecture wiki for Claude Code: a /deepwiki command that maps the repo with a bundled Rust scanner, has a subagent write & refresh hierarchical wiki pages (.deepwiki/*.md) with source links, and tracks freshness against git. Inspired by Devin Wiki. Subscription-native (binary + subagent + command, no API key).

plugins.name: difflog
plugins.description: Session diff-log for Claude Code: snapshot HEAD at SessionStart, write a structured git diff summary (commits, stat, files changed, bounded diff body) at SessionEnd. A /difflog skill can generate a human-readable narrative from the log. Subscription-native (no API key).

plugins.name: donegate
plugins.description: Completion-verification gate for Claude Code: on Stop, run your acceptance commands as subprocesses and block the stop until every required check is green, feeding failures back for an auto-fix loop. Subscription-native (one hook + bundled Rust binary, no API key).

plugins.name: evalkit
plugins.description: Offline golden-regression eval harness for Claude Code plugins: read golden *.jsonl cases (file-content or CLI-output assertions) and exit non-zero when a prompt edit or CLI contract regresses. The offline sibling of condukt's online verifier — runnable as a CI gate with no API key. Subscription-native (one bundled Rust binary).

plugins.name: flow
plugins.description: Unified source→executor driver for Claude Code: a /flow skill that binds the task SOURCES (compass next-move + backlog queue) to the EXECUTOR (condukt, model-routed by fugu-router) in one HOTL loop — gate on compass freshness, pick the highest-priority task, hand it to condukt, verify, mark done, repeat. A SessionStart hook proposes /flow every session when open work exists (propose-then-confirm). Subscription-native (skill + hook + bundled Rust binary, no API key).

plugins.name: fugu-router
plugins.description: fugu-style per-model routing for Claude Code orchestration. Learns from past task outcomes (which model passed verification, at what cost) and picks the cheapest Claude tier that historically clears similar work. Feeds condukt's suggested_model deterministically; records outcomes back to a local episode store. No API key, no embedding service — lexical k-NN over a JSONL store.

plugins.name: gauge
plugins.description: Local LLMOps telemetry for Claude Code: a Stop hook that reads each session's transcript and records token usage, cache hits, tool calls, latency, and estimated cost to a local store — then `gauge report` rolls it up by project, model, and day. Observability for your own agent runs, subscription-native (one hook + bundled Rust binary, no API key, nothing leaves the machine).

plugins.name: harness-status
plugins.description: Unified HOTL status dashboard for Claude Code. A /status command runs a bundled Rust binary that aggregates budgetguard's spend ledger, gauge's session records (recent sessions + cost), and taskprog's progress file into one human-on-the-loop view. Subscription-native (binary + command, no API key, no hooks).

plugins.name: playbook
plugins.description: Project knowledge retrieval + injection for Claude Code: a UserPromptSubmit hook that pulls the curated atomic notes relevant to your prompt and injects them under a strict char budget, so conventions and gotchas resurface without re-typing. Subscription-native (one hook + bundled Rust binary, no API key).

plugins.name: precommit-audit
plugins.description: Config-driven pre-commit static audit for Claude Code: a Stop hook that runs generic checks plus your project rules (from a TOML file) over the pending diff — shelling out to git and optional linters — and blocks the stop, feeding findings back to the agent until they're clean. Subscription-native (one hook + bundled Rust binary, no API key).

plugins.name: reviewgate
plugins.description: Code-review gate for Claude Code: on Stop, review the diff before the agent can declare done. In inject mode it blocks the stop and injects a review rubric so the running agent self-reviews (no API key); in subprocess mode it runs an independent reviewer and surfaces only its findings. Subscription-native, bundled Rust binary.

plugins.name: runbook
plugins.description: Reusable procedure includes for Claude Code: a UserPromptSubmit hook that expands `!name` macros in your prompt into the matching repo-committed procedure (.runbook/<name>.md), so recurring workflows run the same way every time. Inspired by Devin Playbooks; distinct from knowledge injection. Subscription-native (one hook + bundled Rust binary, no API key).

plugins.name: session-insights
plugins.description: Per-session work metrics for Claude Code: PostToolUse + Stop hooks roll up tool calls, turns, files touched, a size class (XS–XL) and a work category per session, viewable with `session-insights report` and optionally logged as a dated note to an Obsidian vault. Inspired by Devin Session Insights. Subscription-native (two hooks + bundled Rust binary, no API key).

plugins.name: specguard
plugins.description: 仕様↔実装 整合監査ハーネスを Claude Code から subscription-native に実行する。各 shard を read-only な in-session subagent で監査し (nested claude --print なし)、決定的ハーネス (scope/render/parse/report) は specguard バイナリに委譲する。

plugins.name: stuckguard
plugins.description: Stuck-loop detector + escalation for Claude Code: a PostToolUse hook that spots repeated identical actions and edit thrash, then injects an escalating nudge to change approach or ask the user for help. Subscription-native (one hook + bundled Rust binary, no API key).

plugins.name: taskprog
plugins.description: Multi-session progress file for Claude Code. Injects .claude/progress.md at SessionStart so the agent knows what is pending; at Stop it prompts the agent to keep the file current. Enables seamless HOTL handoff across sessions.

plugins.name: tdd
plugins.description: Test-first gate for Claude Code: a Stop hook that blocks the turn when implementation code lands without an accompanying test, plus a /tdd skill and red/green/verify subcommands that make test-first (RED before GREEN) a verifiable artifact. Subscription-native (one hook + skill + bundled Rust binary, no API key).

plugins.name: autoflow
plugins.description: Session-end auto-flow gate for Claude Code: on Stop, prompt /record once, then loop /condukt until pending tasks are cleared (auto up to 4×, ask the user from 5× onward). Subscription-native (one hook + bundled Rust binary, no API key).

plugins.name: hypothesis
plugins.description: PDO hypothesis lifecycle management for Claude Code: a /hypothesis skill plus create/validate/list/reject subcommands and a SessionStart hook to create, validate, and track discovery hypotheses aligned with compass goals. Subscription-native (skill + hook + bundled Rust binary, no API key).

plugins.name: daily
plugins.description: Daily-once task runner for Claude Code: a SessionStart hook that runs a security audit (cargo deny check advisories/bans/sources/licenses) at most once per calendar day and feeds findings back into the session. Subscription-native (one hook + bundled Rust binary, no API key).

plugins.name: scout
plugins.description: Multi-lens project audit that generates actionable tasks (施策) for Claude Code: a /scout skill that gathers deterministic project state, fans out read-only sub-agents across five lenses (current issues, security, industry/peer-project practices via web search, missing measures, safety), then dedupes/scores findings into prioritized tasks, writes them to the backlog, and hands execution to /flow. Complements compass as a broad-reconnaissance SOURCE. Subscription-native (skill only, no binary, no API key).
